notes: 1.0.30: lockable config (password 1536) with carriage positions + LEM read live from the Opta flash; plasma time propagates to the Opta, Tip Charger, and 4D display; axial case-fan icon; per-relay LED feedback (RELAY1/RELAY2) + plasma indicator moved off RELAY1's LED; removed the display self-heal that was churning the link and lagging buttons; display COM0 receive-buffer fix; plus the full 24-bug remediation.
